description: Static-site data bundles for SemanticsOfComplementarity companion website v2 (general construct). Two economies: CA (NAPCS Canada, 7-digit) and US (NAPCS US, 10-digit).
cosine_method: Dense models (glove/gemini/openai) mean-centered over universe then L2-normalized; cosine=dot. TF-IDF: TfidfVectorizer(stop_words='english',min_df=2) on metadata 'text', rows L2-normalized, cosine=dot. Matches analytics-general/full-census/general_rank_only.py exactly.

files.description: Per-category metadata keyed by code: title, section (NAPCS section digit(s)), domain (consumer_final|non_consumer|REVIEW xvendor consensus), type_hint.
UMAP 2-D coordinates [x,y] (4 dp) keyed by code, aligned to metadata CSV row order.
Per-focal complements (gpt-4o & gemini-2.5-pro, ranked, with per-representation cosines) and same-sibling substitutes (capped 12, closest by gemini cosine).
